zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen於1526年7月10日出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯時，他的父親Philippe de Croÿ II31歲，母親Anne van Chimay24歲。他於1558年5月1日與Johanna Henriette de Halewyn結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1595年12月11日在義大利維圖維其亞享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen于1526年7月10日出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯时，他的父亲Philippe de Croÿ II31岁，母亲Anne van Chimay24岁。他于1558年5月1日与Johanna Henriette de Halewyn结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1595年12月11日在意大利維圖維其亞享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Croy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Orkney): habitational name from any of several places called Croy, for example in Inverness-shire.
Probably also Irish: shortened form of   McCroy  , which is a variant of   McRoy  .

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hoesen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm name in Førde in western Norway, from Old Norse hollr ‘friendly, generous’ and sær ‘sea’, denoting a location rich in fish. Compare Holson .

nameMeanings.name: Phillipe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen was born on 10 July 1526, in Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Philippe de Croÿ II, was 31 and his mother, Anne van Chimay, was 24. He married Johanna Henriette de Halewyn on 1 May 1558. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 11 December 1595, in Venice, Veneto, Italy, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen est né le 10 juillet 1526, à Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Philippe de Croÿ II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Anne van Chimay, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Henriette de Halewyn le 1 mai 1558. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1595, à Venezia, Veneto, Italie, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen am 10. Juli 1526 in Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philippe de Croÿ II 31 und seine Mutter Anne van Chimay 24. Er hat am 1. Mai 1558 Johanna Henriette de Halewyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1595 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Venezia, Veneto, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen è nato il il 10 luglio 1526 nel Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Philippe de Croÿ II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Anne van Chimay, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Henriette de Halewyn il 1 maggio 1558. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 dicembre 1595, nel Venezia, Veneto, Italia, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesenが1526年7月10日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードベレンシエンスで生まれた時，父Philippe de Croÿ IIは31歳，母Anne van Chimayは24歳であった。1558年5月1日にJohanna Henriette de Halewynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1595年12月11日にイタリアベンエトーベンエズアで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen(이)가 1526년 7월 10일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 발시네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philippe de Croÿ II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne van Chimay(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1558년 5월 1일 Johanna Henriette de Halewyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1595년 12월 11일 이탈리아 븐토 븐지아에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.10 July 1526–11 December 1595: 1526 оны Долоодугаар сарын 10–1595 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 11

pt.10 July 1526–11 December 1595: 10 de julho de 1526–11 de dezembro de 1595
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen nasceu em 10 de julho de 1526, em Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Philippe de Croÿ II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Anne van Chimay, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Henriette de Halewyn em 1 de maio de 1558. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1595, em Venezia, Veneto, Itália, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen родился 10 июля 1526 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Philippe de Croÿ II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Anne van Chimay, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Henriette de Halewyn 1 мая 1558 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 декабря 1595 г. в местности винезя, винето, Италия в возрасте 69 лет.

es.10 July 1526–11 December 1595: 10 de julio de 1526–11 de diciembre de 1595
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phillipe de Croy Aerschot Van Hoesen nació el 10 de julio de 1526, en Valenciennes, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Philippe de Croÿ II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Anne van Chimay, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Johanna Henriette de Halewyn el 1 de mayo de 1558. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1595, en Venezia, Veneto, Italia, a la edad de 69 años.
